+# Execution Report
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-171
+AUTHOR: Executor / Claude
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-25_10-51-13+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- Cargo.toml — added single workspace member `crates/rge-scene-loader`
+- Cargo.lock — mechanical entry for new `rge-scene-loader` package
+- crates/rge-scene-loader/Cargo.toml — new bridge crate manifest
+- crates/rge-scene-loader/src/lib.rs — `load_scene_into_world` + `SceneLoadError` + 3 unit tests
+- crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/simple_scene.rs — 3 golden simple-scene integration tests
+STATUS: AWAITING_REVIEW
+
+## Task Packet Reference
+
+`ai_handoffs/ISSUE-171_TASK_2026-05-25_10-33-12+0300.md`
+
+## Pre-Execution Review Consumed
+
+No pre-execution review issued for this dispatch.
+
+## What I Changed
+
+### Source
+
+- `crates/rge-scene-loader/Cargo.toml`: new library crate using workspace
+  package/lints; path deps on `rge-data`, `rge-components-{spatial,render,visibility}`
+  (none are in root `[workspace.dependencies]`); workspace deps on
+  `rge-kernel-ecs`, `ron`, `thiserror`. No third-party packages added.
+- `crates/rge-scene-loader/src/lib.rs`:
+  - Public entry point
+    `pub fn load_scene_into_world(scene: &rge_data::Scene) -> Result<World, SceneLoadError>`.
+  - `SceneLoadError` enum with `UnsupportedComponent` and `Deserialize`
+    variants (typed source: `ron::de::SpannedError`).
+  - Spawn loop walks every `Scene::entities` first, converting each
+    `rge_data::EntityId` via `rge_kernel_ecs::EntityId::from_ulid(*scene_id.as_ulid())`
+    and calling `World::spawn_with_id(...)` (never `World::spawn()`).
+  - Component loop dispatches through a literal four-arm match on
+    `component.type_id.as_str()` for exactly
+    `"rge::components::Transform"`, `"rge::components::Camera"`,
+    `"rge::components::Light"`, `"rge::components::Visibility"`. Each arm
+    calls the matching `ron::from_str::<T>(...)` and `World::insert(ecs_id, value)`
+    with the original component crate types — no wrappers, no erased path,
+    no reflection. Any other `type_id` returns
+    `SceneLoadError::UnsupportedComponent`; a RON parse failure returns
+    `SceneLoadError::Deserialize`.
+  - Scene relations and `root_entities` are intentionally not consumed
+    (hierarchy materialization is out-of-scope per the Constraints).
+- `Cargo.toml` (root): single member-list insertion of
+  `"crates/rge-scene-loader"` adjacent to `"crates/rge-data"`. No
+  `[workspace.dependencies]`, lints, features, exclude, profile, patch,
+  or other metadata changes.
+- `Cargo.lock`: one new `[[package]] name = "rge-scene-loader"` entry
+  whose deps are all already-existing workspace packages plus pre-existing
+  `ron` and `thiserror 2.0.18`. No third-party additions, no version
+  bumps, no checksum or source changes.
+
+### Tests
+
+- `crates/rge-scene-loader/src/lib.rs::tests::unsupported_component_errors`
+  — pins that a fabricated `"rge::components::Mystery"` envelope returns
+  `SceneLoadError::UnsupportedComponent` (no silent skip).
+- `crates/rge-scene-loader/src/lib.rs::tests::malformed_payload_errors`
+  — pins that a `Visibility` envelope with bad RON returns
+  `SceneLoadError::Deserialize`.
+- `crates/rge-scene-loader/src/lib.rs::tests::empty_scene_yields_empty_world`
+  — pins that loading an empty scene produces a `World` with
+  `entity_count() == 0`.
+- `crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/simple_scene.rs::golden_camera_has_transform_camera_and_visible`
+  — reads tracked
+  `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene` via
+  `ron::from_str::<Scene>`, locates the `Camera` entity by parsing its
+  canonical ULID `0000000000000G000000000000` through
+  `rge_data::EntityId::from_str` and converting via
+  `EntityId::from_ulid(*scene_id.as_ulid())`. Asserts
+  `world.entity(camera_id).unwrap().get::<Transform>()`,
+  `get::<Camera>()`, and `get::<Visibility>()` are present, with
+  `*get::<Visibility>() == Visibility::Visible`.
+- `crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/simple_scene.rs::golden_keylight_has_transform_and_light`
+  — same fixture, pins `KeyLight` (ULID
+  `00000000000010000000000000`) carrying `Transform` and `Light`.
+- `crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/simple_scene.rs::golden_scene_loads_two_entities_total`
+  — confirms only the two pinned entities are present.
+
+Tests read the golden fixture via `std::fs::read_to_string` only — no
+`golden-projects/**` files are modified.
+
+### Docs
+
+- None. Crate-level `//!` module doc covers the scope; no ADRs, schemas,
+  status files, or change.md entries are required by this packet.
+
+## Per-File Summary
+
+(Single-line bullets above already say enough.)
+
+## Verification Results
+
+- `cargo test -p rge-scene-loader` → exit 0
+  - lib unit tests: 3 passed / 0 failed / 0 ignored
+  - `tests/simple_scene.rs` integration tests: 3 passed / 0 failed / 0 ignored
+  - doc-tests: 0 passed / 0 failed / 0 ignored
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` → exit 0, `VERIFY OK: all 7 verification step(s) passed.`
+  - [1] `cargo +nightly fmt --check` → ok
+  - [2] `architecture lints` → ok
+  - [3] `architecture-lint test suite` → ok
+  - [4] `cargo deny check` → ok
+  - [5] `cargo test --workspace --all-targets -j 1` → ok
+  - [6] `cargo test --workspace --doc -j 1` → ok
+  - [7] `cargo bench -p rge-script-bench --no-run` → ok
+  - Full log archived at `.ai/verify.run.log`.
+- Diff inspection — changed production source is confined to
+  `crates/rge-scene-loader/**` (one `Cargo.toml`, one `src/lib.rs`,
+  one `tests/simple_scene.rs`). The only edits outside that crate are
+  the one permitted member entry in root `Cargo.toml` and the mechanical
+  `rge-scene-loader` entry in `Cargo.lock`.
+  `git diff --stat`: `Cargo.lock | 13 +++++++++++++`,
+  `Cargo.toml |  1 +`, plus untracked `crates/rge-scene-loader/`.
+- Diff inspection — no protected paths in `MUST NOT edit` changed: no
+  edits to `crates/rge-data/**`, `kernel/**`, `crates/components-*/**`,
+  `golden-projects/**`, `editor/**`, `runtime/**`, `crates/editor-shell/**`,
+  `crates/script-host/**`, `crates/script-bench/**`, `crates/gfx/**`,
+  `crates/brep-render/**`, `crates/io-*/**`, `crates/asset-store/**`, or
+  `crates/macros-reflect/**`. No docs, ADRs, schemas, scripts, workflows,
+  architecture-lint files, status files, planning files, or dispatch
+  automation files modified.
+- Crate inspection — `crates/rge-scene-loader/src/lib.rs` contains no
+  `Reflect`, `kernel/types`, `inventory`, `linkme`, registry/registration
+  macro, `SnapshotComponent`, wrapper component type, `insert_erased`,
+  `Box<dyn Any>`, `TypeId`, or other type-erased component insertion path.
+  The dispatch is a literal four-arm match on `&str` with typed
+  `ron::from_str::<T>` and typed `World::insert(EntityId, C)` for each
+  component crate type.
+
+## Deviations from Task Packet
+
+None — execution stayed strictly within the Task Packet scope.
+
+## Open Questions for Reviewer
+
+- None. The crate-level docs mention that scene relations / root entities
+  are intentionally not materialized in this bridge (hierarchy belongs to
+  a future pass per the Constraints / Non-Goals). Flagging here only in
+  case the Reviewer expects a TODO marker — the doc currently states the
+  omission directly.
+
+## Worktree State
+
+- Tracked files (modified-but-uncommitted): `Cargo.toml`, `Cargo.lock`.
+- Untracked items:
+  - `crates/rge-scene-loader/` (new crate — `Cargo.toml`, `src/lib.rs`,
+    `tests/simple_scene.rs`)
+  - `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-171_TASK_2026-05-25_10-33-12+0300.md` (this
+    dispatch's TASK packet, pre-existing on the branch)
+  - `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-171_TASK_2026-05-25_10-33-12+0300.meta.json`
+    (matching TASK sidecar)
+  - `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-171_EXEC_2026-05-25_10-51-13+0300.md` (this report)
+  - `.ai/verify.run.log` (gitignored verify-gate log)
+- Branch: `ai-dispatch/ISSUE-171`
+- Last commit: `9e1debf` chore(dispatch): queue scene loader retry
+
+---
+
+HANDOFF_STATUS: COMPLETE
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-171
+AUTHOR: Executor / Claude
+NEXT_ROLE: REVIEWER_AI
+EXIT_CODE: 0
+
+---

@@ -0,0 +1,262 @@
+# Task Packet
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-171
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-25_10-33-12+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- Cargo.toml
+- Cargo.lock
+- crates/rge-scene-loader/Cargo.toml
+- crates/rge-scene-loader/src/**/*.rs
+- crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/**/*.rs
+- crates/rge-data/src/scene.rs
+- crates/rge-data/src/entity_ref.rs
+- crates/components-spatial/src/transform.rs
+- crates/components-render/src/camera.rs
+- crates/components-render/src/light.rs
+- crates/components-visibility/src/visibility.rs
+- golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project
+- golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene
+- .ai/dispatch.verify.ps1
+- GitHub issue #171
+STATUS: OPEN
+
+## Goal
+
+Create the narrow `rge-scene-loader` bridge crate requested by GitHub issue
+#171. The crate must load an already-parsed `rge_data::Scene` into an
+`rge_kernel_ecs::World`, preserving scene ULIDs as ECS entity IDs and inserting
+the four current simple-scene component types through the typed ECS
+`World::insert` API. This is the retry of the Scene-to-World bridge after the
+component crates and sparse ECS rows were prepared by prior work; it must not
+re-open schema, ECS, reflection, renderer, editor, runtime, or golden-fixture
+scope.
+
+## Scope
+
+### MAY edit
+
+- `Cargo.toml` at the workspace root, only to add exactly
+  `"crates/rge-scene-loader"` as one new workspace member. Do not add root
+  `[workspace.dependencies]`, feature, lint, exclude, profile, patch, or other
+  metadata changes.
+- `Cargo.lock`, only for the mechanical package/dependency entry Cargo writes
+  for the new `rge-scene-loader` workspace member. No third-party package
+  additions, version bumps, checksum changes, source changes, or unrelated
+  dependency churn are allowed.
+- `crates/rge-scene-loader/Cargo.toml`
+- `crates/rge-scene-loader/src/**/*.rs`
+- `crates/rge-scene-loader/tests/**/*.rs`
+
+### MUST NOT edit
+
+- `crates/rge-data/**`
+- `kernel/**`
+- `crates/components-spatial/**`
+- `crates/components-render/**`
+- `crates/components-visibility/**`
+- `golden-projects/**`
+- `editor/**`
+- `runtime/**`
+- `crates/editor-shell/**`
+- `crates/script-host/**`
+- `crates/script-bench/**`
+- `crates/gfx/**`
+- `crates/brep-render/**`
+- `crates/io-*/**`
+- `crates/asset-store/**`
+- `crates/macros-reflect/**`
+- Any production source outside `crates/rge-scene-loader/**`
+- Any root `Cargo.toml` content except the single permitted workspace member
+  entry
+- Any `Cargo.toml` outside `crates/rge-scene-loader/Cargo.toml` except the
+  single permitted root workspace member edit
+- Any docs, ADRs, schemas, scripts, workflows, golden-project files,
+  architecture-lint files, status files, planning files, or dispatch automation
+  files
+- Any `ai_handoffs/**` packet other than this executor's required
+  `ISSUE-171_EXEC_*.md` report and its optional generated sidecar
+
+### MAY add new files
+
+- Files under `crates/rge-scene-loader/**`, for exactly one new library crate.
+- `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-171_EXEC_*.md` and its optional generated `.meta.json`
+  sidecar.
+
+### MUST NOT add new files
+
+- Any new workspace member, crate, example, tool, app, package, fixture, asset,
+  generated output, or golden-project file other than `crates/rge-scene-loader`.
+- Any file under a protected path listed in `MUST NOT edit`.
+- Any docs, ADRs, schemas, scripts, workflows, architecture lints, status files,
+  planning files, or handoff packets other than the executor's allowed
+  `ISSUE-171_EXEC_*.md` report.
+
+## Deliverables
+
+- Add exactly one new workspace member, `crates/rge-scene-loader`, to the root
+  workspace member list.
+- Create a new library crate named `rge-scene-loader` under
+  `crates/rge-scene-loader` using existing workspace package metadata and
+  workspace lints.
+- Add only the dependencies needed for this bridge: `rge-data`,
+  `rge-kernel-ecs`, `rge-components-spatial`, `rge-components-render`,
+  `rge-components-visibility`, `ron`, and a small error dependency such as
+  `thiserror` only if the implementation uses it. Use path dependencies for
+  internal crates that are not already present in root `[workspace.dependencies]`
+  rather than editing root workspace dependency metadata.
+- Expose a public Scene-to-World loader API. The required public entry point is
+  `pub fn load_scene_into_world(scene: &rge_data::Scene) -> Result<rge_kernel_ecs::World, SceneLoadError>`.
+  Additional private helpers are allowed inside the new crate only.
+- Preserve every `rge_data::EntityId` ULID by converting with
+  `rge_kernel_ecs::EntityId::from_ulid(...)` and creating the ECS entity with
+  `World::spawn_with_id(...)`. Do not call `World::spawn()` for scene entities.
+- Spawn all scene entities before component insertion so every later
+  `World::insert` targets an entity that already exists.
+- Implement an explicit match table over `ComponentValue.type_id.as_str()` for
+  exactly these four strings and no additional component type IDs:
+  `rge::components::Transform`, `rge::components::Camera`,
+  `rge::components::Light`, and `rge::components::Visibility`.
+- For each supported component arm, deserialize the raw
+  `ComponentValue.data` with the matching typed call:
+  `ron::from_str::<Transform>`, `ron::from_str::<Camera>`,
+  `ron::from_str::<Light>`, or `ron::from_str::<Visibility>`.
+- Insert the parsed original component values through the current typed
+  `rge_kernel_ecs::World::insert` API. The inserted types must be the component
+  crate types themselves, not wrapper types.
+- Return a loader error for unsupported `ComponentValue.type_id` values or
+  failed typed RON deserialization. Do not silently skip unsupported or invalid
+  components.
+- Add focused `rge-scene-loader` tests using the tracked
+  `golden-projects/simple-scene` fixture. The tests must prove that the loaded
+  `World` contains:
+  - the golden `Camera` entity with `Transform`, `Camera`, and
+    `Visibility::Visible`; and
+  - the golden `KeyLight` entity with `Transform` and `Light`.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- The root workspace has exactly one new member: `crates/rge-scene-loader`.
+- No root workspace dependency metadata or unrelated root manifest content is
+  changed.
+- The new crate compiles as package `rge-scene-loader` and exposes
+  `load_scene_into_world(&rge_data::Scene) -> Result<World, SceneLoadError>`.
+- The loader converts every scene entity ID through
+  `rge_kernel_ecs::EntityId::from_ulid` and calls `World::spawn_with_id` for
+  each scene entity before inserting components.
+- The component bridge is a literal four-arm match table for only
+  `rge::components::Transform`, `rge::components::Camera`,
+  `rge::components::Light`, and `rge::components::Visibility`.
+- Each supported component arm uses the typed `ron::from_str::<T>` call for the
+  matching component type and then calls `World::insert(entity_id, parsed_value)`.
+- The implementation does not use `Reflect`, `kernel/types`, `inventory`,
+  `linkme`, any global registry, any registration macro, `SnapshotComponent`,
+  wrapper component types, `World::insert_erased`, `Box<dyn Any>`, `TypeId`, or
+  any other type-erased component insertion path.
+- The golden simple-scene test locates or otherwise pins the `Camera` entity and
+  asserts that `world.entity(camera_id).unwrap().get::<Transform>()`,
+  `get::<Camera>()`, and `get::<Visibility>()` are present, with the visibility
+  value equal to `Visibility::Visible`.
+- The golden simple-scene test locates or otherwise pins the `KeyLight` entity
+  and asserts that `world.entity(light_id).unwrap().get::<Transform>()` and
+  `get::<Light>()` are present.
+- The tests must read the golden fixture but must not modify
+  `golden-projects/**`.
+- `Cargo.lock`, if changed, is limited to the new `rge-scene-loader` package
+  entry and its dependency edges to already-existing packages.
+
+## Constraints / Non-Goals
+
+- Do not modify `rge-data` schemas, entity IDs, scene fixtures, component
+  crates, ECS internals, ECS public API, renderer code, editor code, runtime
+  code, IO crates, asset-store code, or reflection code.
+- Do not introduce reflection, a registry, a macro registration system,
+  inventory/linkme discovery, `kernel/types`, snapshot restore machinery, or
+  type-erased component insertion.
+- Do not add support for any component type besides the four simple-scene types
+  named in this packet.
+- Do not implement relation loading, root-entity hierarchy behavior, transform
+  propagation, renderer resource creation, asset handle resolution, scene file
+  watching, editor integration, runtime integration, or project loading beyond
+  what is needed by the focused tests.
+- Do not create wrapper components, local mirror structs, default placeholder
+  components, or component-name aliases.
+- Do not change existing tests outside the new crate. If existing tests fail,
+  diagnose and report within the allowed scope rather than editing protected
+  files.
+

+## Halt Conditions
+
+The Executor MUST halt without committing and request fresh guidance if any of

+
+- Satisfying the task appears to require editing any protected path or any

+- Satisfying the task appears to require modifying `rge-data`, `kernel`,

+
+## Planner Notes
+
+The expected implementation is intentionally small: parse a `Scene` that the
+caller already has, create a fresh `World`, preserve scene IDs through
+`EntityId::from_ulid` plus `spawn_with_id`, then walk each component envelope
+through an explicit four-string `match` and typed RON deserialization. Unknown
+component type IDs should be surfaced as a loader error so future scene content
+does not disappear silently.
+
+The existing golden fixture already pins the two relevant entities:
+`Camera` has `Transform`, `Camera`, and `Visibility`; `KeyLight` has
+`Transform` and `Light`. Tests in the new crate may use the canonical entity ID
+strings from `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene` or locate the
+scene entities by `name` before converting their ULIDs to ECS IDs.
+
+Under the orchestrator protocol, no `_REVIEW_` or `_CLOSEOUT_` packet is
+expected from this TASK. The only new packet produced by execution should be
